layoutRegions.name: simulation-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: At-a-glance counts for proposed changes, risky deny paths, compensating controls, and ready simulations.

layoutRegions.name: proposal-simulations
layoutRegions.purpose: Keyboard-focusable rows for proposed access changes and their simulated deny paths.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-and-controls
layoutRegions.purpose: Panels for blast-radius deltas, compensating controls, reviewer confidence, and rollback evidence.

components.name: SimulationRow
components.purpose: Focusable proposed access change row with impacted principals, deny path, and confidence score.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states expose row selection
risk state is shown with semantic danger, warning, info, or success

components.name: BlastCard
components.purpose: Blast-radius delta card that keeps before, after, and access impact visible.
interactions: tone label stays visible without overlapping text
card sizing remains stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: GuardrailList
components.purpose: Ordered simulation evidence checklist for rollback-safe access changes.
interactions: primary evidence action has visible hover and focus-visible states
guardrail numbers are stable and token-colored

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
